description: Velocx NZ sells premium Italian competitive swimwear for serious swimmers and triathletes. Products are crafted for performance, speed, and elite competition.
tone: premium, performance-driven, passionate about swimming, aspirational, technical yet accessible
target_audience: competitive swimmers, triathletes, swim clubs, coaches, and aquatic sports enthusiasts in New Zealand aged 16-45
content_pillars: performance and speed tips for competitive swimmers
NZ swim community and local events
care and maintenance of performance swimwear
